action.reasoning: Observation: Empty workspace except model.py from prior. Need to build training/predict scripts. Decision: Use wav2vec2-xls-r-300m with weighted-sum pooling, train with codec-style augmentation for generalization. Start with a quick training run (1-2 epochs) to validate pipeline and measure time, then submit eval.
